title: Ras Al Khaimah Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ras Al Khaimah with a Z-Score of +3.80. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Ras Al Khaimah is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 39%, and the wind speed is 8.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no relief from the heat, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to extreme heat
energia_impact: High energy demand expected due to AC usage
